taxonomy: Nissolia longiflora is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to South America and belongs to the genus Nissolia. This species is further categorized as a legume, which is a type of plant that produces seeds in pods. The classification of Nissolia longiflora is based on its botanical characteristics and morphology. The plant's classification is also influenced by its evolutionary relationships with other species within the Fabaceae family.
